title: Claude Fable 5 is Banned... Do THIS Right Now
summary: A video discussing Claude Fable 5's removal from availability and advocating for local AI deployment using Ollama as a mitigation strategy. It demonstrates building a self-hosted NotebookLM alternative and setting up model routing with OpenRouter to reduce dependency on single cloud providers.
writeup: The video responds to the removal of Claude Fable 5 from availability by arguing for local AI deployment as a hedge against losing access to a single hosted model. It walks through running models locally with Ollama, including building a self-hosted alternative to NotebookLM, and configuring model routing through OpenRouter. The central takeaway is reducing dependence on any single cloud provider by combining local inference with a routing layer that can fall back across models.
